name: Attributes
description: Attributes & Modifiers vocabulary. An Attribute is a property a concept can have. A Value holds the Attribute's current setting and points back to its Attribute via OF. Value IS-A Temporaneous, so a Value's content evolves over time — every Value HAS State AT Tick chains let you track how an attribute's setting changes moment-to-moment. State UPDATES Value expresses causation: applying this State to that Value produces the Value's next State. A Modifier in the old sense (an explicit '+5 healing' or '-3 poison') is now just a State — same vocabulary, no separate concept. Typical use: HitPoints is an Attribute; HPCurrent is a Value OF HitPoints; HPCurrent HAS HP75 AT Tick3; Poison5 (a State) UPDATES HPCurrent (which together produce HP70 at Tick4).
